labelTaxonomy.name: Public
labelTaxonomy.description: Approved for public release with no customer or regulated data.

labelTaxonomy.name: Internal
labelTaxonomy.description: Business information for internal use that does not require heightened regulatory handling.

labelTaxonomy.name: Confidential
labelTaxonomy.description: Sensitive business information such as customer, financial, or operational material that requires controlled access.

labelTaxonomy.name: Highly Confidential
labelTaxonomy.description: Regulated or highly sensitive information that requires strict handling, limited sharing, and enhanced monitoring.

labelTaxonomy.name: Restricted
labelTaxonomy.description: Trading-sensitive, privileged legal, or similarly constrained information requiring the strongest protections.
